title: KilrockPRO Wood, Deck & Fence Cleaner
features: MADE IN THE U.K. From our factory in Chesham, Buckinghamshire, we design, formulate, blend, fill, pack, sell and distribute a full range of specialist household problem-solving and cleaning products
description: Product Description KilrockPRO Wood, Deck & Fence Cleaner cleans, brightens and rejuvenates outdoor wooden surfaces. Trade strength formula effortlessly removes dirt & stains caused by algae, mould & mildew on fences, wood, decking, sheds, cladding, shake shingles & other wood surfaces. Easy to use, just apply and leave to dry. Ingredients Alkyl (C12-16) Dimethylbenzyl Ammonium Chloride 4.802% W/W
